topic: Google ADK vs LangGraph vs Mastra: Choosing the Right Agent Framework in 2026
keyword: google adk vs langgraph vs mastra

key_points: ADK emphasizes velocity and structure with higher-level abstractions like Sequential/Parallel agents
LangGraph gives surgical control for compliance-heavy, custom-flow, cloud-agnostic workloads
ADK integrates natively with Google Cloud: one-command deployment, managed sessions, Cloud Trace
Most enterprises at scale converge on LangGraph for complex production systems
Hands-on side-by-side installation comparison of both frameworks
ADK workflows less visual but more familiar to Python developers
LangGraph's conditional edges shine for dynamic branching in generate-verify-retry loops
ADK gets prototype-to-deployed agent faster than anything else
Tier list ranking: LangGraph, CrewAI, ADK, Mastra, OpenAI Agents SDK across use cases
By language: Python teams choose LangGraph/CrewAI/ADK; TypeScript teams choose Mastra/OpenAI SDK
LangGraph wins 3 categories, Mastra wins 1, 1 tied in head-to-head feature comparison
ADK best enterprise option for multi-language SDKs and GCP integration
Production benchmark: 18 hours dev time with Mastra vs 41 hours with LangChain
Task completion rates: 94.2% (Mastra) vs 87.4% (LangChain)
P95 latency: 1,240ms (Mastra) vs 2,450ms (LangChain)
Error rates: 5.8% (Mastra) vs 8.9% (LangChain)
ADK standout feature: native A2A protocol for cross-framework agent communication
ADK multimodal capabilities via Gemini: images, audio, video natively
LangGraph checkpointing enables time-travel debugging and human-in-the-loop approvals
Only CrewAI, Mastra, and Google ADK ship genuine built-in memory; LangGraph has checkpointing

stats.fact: Global AI agent market reached $7.84 billion in 2025, projected to reach $52.62 billion by 2030 (CAGR 46.3%)
Gartner predicts 40% of enterprise applications will feature task-specific AI agents by end of 2026, up from less than 5% in 2025
LangGraph: 34.5M monthly downloads, 24k+ GitHub stars, production deployments at Uber, JP Morgan, BlackRock, Cisco, LinkedIn, Klarna
Mastra: 300k+ weekly npm downloads, 22,000+ GitHub stars, raised $13M seed round in February 2026
Google ADK: 8,200+ GitHub stars, supports Python, TypeScript, Go, and Java (graduated to 1.0 GA)
A2A (Agent-to-Agent) protocol surpassed 150 organizations in production, now governed by the Linux Foundation
Mastra enterprise deployments: Replit, PayPal, Adobe, Marsh McLennan (75,000 employees), SoftBank (Satto Workspace)
Mastra supports over 3,300 models from 94 providers as of March 2026
LangGraph v1.1.3 released with deep agent templates and distributed runtime support
CrewAI used by 60%+ Fortune 500 companies for role-based agent prototyping

angles: Language determines framework: the definitive decision tree (Python → ADK/LangGraph, TypeScript → Mastra)
ADK's native A2A protocol: why cross-framework agent interoperability is the 2026 differentiator
LangGraph's checkpointing and human-in-the-loop for regulated industries (finance, healthcare)
Mastra Studio vs LangSmith: developer experience battle for observability and debugging
Cloud-agnostic freedom vs vendor lock-in: LangGraph everywhere vs ADK on GCP
Multimodal agents: ADK's Gemini integration gives it an edge no Python-first framework has
Production maturity gap: LangGraph battle-tested vs ADK and Mastra still discovering edge cases
The hidden cost comparison: which framework ships faster and breaks less in production
keywords: google adk vs langgraph vs mastra
langgraph checkpointing human in the loop
